subject: f/u to dr. kaminski @ enron from iris mack

emails.subject: Re: F/U to Dr. Kaminski @ Enron from Iris Mack
emails.subject_base: F/U to Dr. Kaminski @ Enron from Iris Mack
emails.body: Molly, I would like to invite Iris for an interview. You can contact her at the addresses she listed below or at her E-mail address. The following persons will participate at the interview: Stinson Gibner Zimin Lu Tanya Tamarchenko Vasant Shanbhogue myself Stinson and I will take her out to lunch. Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 11/27/2000 01:35 PM "iris mack" <irismmack@hotmail.com> on 11/21/2000 04:12:43 PM
